title: Treasury yields little changed as investors look ahead to key jobs data
summary_full: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Monday as investors looked to key jobs data and monitored a fragile pause in hositilies between the U.S. and Iran.
summary_public: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Monday as investors looked to key jobs data and monitored a fragile pause in hositilies between the U.S. and Iran.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: fragile pause in hositilies between the U.S. and Iran
